description: Microsoft 365 Outlook calendar via Graph: list, get, create, update, respond, free/busy.
name: io.github.mindstone/mcp-server-microsoft-calendar

environmentVariables.description: Microsoft Entra (Azure AD) application client ID
environmentVariables.name: MS_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Path to the per-user Microsoft config directory (credentials/, accounts.json)
environmentVariables.name: MS_CONFIG_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Account email when running in multi-account per-instance mode (falls back to the first account in accounts.json)
environmentVariables.name: MS_ACCOUNT_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: Logical package ID surfaced in error responses
environmentVariables.name: MS_MCP_PACKAGE_ID

environmentVariables.description: Override the upstream Microsoft Graph request timeout in milliseconds (max 300000 = 5 min)
environmentVariables.name: MICROSOFT_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS

title: Microsoft 365 Calendar
